arts.ttl: Jack Fitzwater signs new Exeter City contract
arts.sum: Jack Fitzwater wants to take Exeter City to the next level after committing his future to the club for another two years. It’s massive and I’m really happy I came forward and did that and again I’m just really grateful the way the club have treated me since I’ve been here and obviously offered me a new contract which I hope I can repay them with.”
